definition:
1. love , [variant datesTragica Adespota:—; love of  a thing, desire for  it, τινός (Herdotus Historicus), etc.:—;in plural loves, amours , (Euripides); in (Sophocles Tragicus), of passionate joy , compare φρίσσω II. 3. 
2. as proper noun the god of love, Eros, Amor , (Sophocles Tragicus) (ML)
